steps.title: Compare the two views
steps.content: Text 1 calls Asimov's characters flat and treats that flatness as part of a criticism. Text 2 argues that Asimov's limited characterization was intentional and helped serve his larger thematic aim in Foundation.

steps.title: Choose Text 2's response
steps.content:
• Choice A: Gets Text 2 backward because Foundation is the example of flat characterization.
  • Choice B: Says fewer ideas would help, which Text 2 never suggests.
  • Choice C: Invents a weakness in Asimov's historical understanding.
  • Choice D: Matches Text 2's claim that flatness served Asimov's aims.
The answer is D.
